raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes checking whether the argument moves coherently from interface description to empirical findings and contribution claims.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical claims based on participant logs, task outcomes, and qualitative responses, so checking whether those claims match the reported evidence is central.","R1.4":"The passage contains multiple firstness and foundational contribution claims, making novelty assessment a central responsibility even without a full literature audit.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose from a paper section, sentence-level clarity, register, and concision are centrally implicated.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be checked from the excerpt alone and what would require external evidence.","RX.2":"The passage includes strong claims, so avoiding endorsement of unsupported overclaims is always active.","RX.3":"The agent must only project responsibilities and must not perform the requested checking or edit the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly claims or unsupported downstream use of the passage.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's specific content."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes checking whether the argument moves coherently from interface description to empirical findings and contribution claims.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical claims based on participant logs, task outcomes, and qualitative responses, so checking whether those claims match the reported evidence is central.
rationale.R1.4: The passage contains multiple firstness and foundational contribution claims, making novelty assessment a central responsibility even without a full literature audit.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose from a paper section, sentence-level clarity, register, and concision are centrally implicated.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be checked from the excerpt alone and what would require external evidence.
rationale.RX.2: The passage includes strong claims, so avoiding endorsement of unsupported overclaims is always active.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must only project responsibilities and must not perform the requested checking or edit the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly claims or unsupported downstream use of the passage.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's specific content.
